workout.warmup: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.5 mph · 8% incline — push the pace a bit to get HR climbing early
workout.finisher: Spin bike · 12 min · moderate-high resistance OR incline walk · 10 min · 3.5 mph · 8%

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Clean at 335 last Monday — bumping 10 lb. Controlled tempo, no lockout at top. 1-2 RIR.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Hold at 140 — push for 14 on the last set. Squeeze glutes at top, no hyperextension. Short rest keeps HR up.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: Step long, knee tracks over toe. Torso upright. Glute emphasis. These will get your heart rate moving.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: You hit 77 on your final set last time — make it the standard today across all 3 sets. Controlled eccentric, full range.

exercises.name: KB Swing (Two-Hand)
exercises.note: Drive from hips, not arms. Hinge back, explode forward. This is your HR spike — 45s rest is intentional. Keep form tight.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat (KB)
exercises.note: Up from 40 lb. Heels elevated if mobility needs it. Can superset with KB Swings if energy is there.

exercises.name: Core Circuit B
exercises.detail: Pallof Press 20 lb × 10/side + Ab Wheel × 8-10 + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Anti-rotation into rollout into stability. Go slow on ab wheel — only extend as far as lower back stays neutral.

week.note: Leg press, hip thrust, lunges, KB swings — ~70 min
Flat bench / pull focus — back to push/pull split
